title: i18n: localize Search/Goals/Projects pages (ZAI-165)
description:
Parent ZAI-165. Several pages still show untranslated English (or hardcoded labels) in the UI. Localize them across all 8 locales and verify on the live UI.

Pages reported by the board:
- /SDF/search — title 'Search', helper text 'Type to search company memory.', tab labels (All/Issues/Comments/Documents/Agents/Projects), descriptions ('Identifier lookup…', 'Quoted phrases…', '⌘K reopens…')
- /SDF/goals — heading 'Goals', 'New Goal' button
- /SDF/projects/onboarding/issues — 'Onboarding', tabs 'Issues / Overview / Configuration / Budget', 'Новая задача' is already RU but verify others
- /SDF/projects/onboarding/overview — 'Idle', 'Status', 'Add a description' placeholder
- /SDF/projects/onboarding/configuration — option labels 'Plain'/'Secret', placeholder 'value', date labels
- /SDF/projects/onboarding/budget — 'Healthy', 'Lifetime budget', 'Observed', 'No cap configured', 'Budget', 'Disabled', 'Soft alert at 80%', 'Remaining', 'Unlimited', 'Budget (USD)', 'Set budget'

Acceptance:
- All listed strings flow through t() with keys added to en + 7 other locales (de, el, es, pt, uk, zh, ru, fr — match existing locale set).
- No hardcoded English left on the listed routes; verify in browser at http://127.0.0.1:3105 (current company SDF).
- Tests/typecheck pass for ui/.

Work on the fork repo (paperclip_fork_Enterprise) only — do NOT touch the upstream public repo (see memory: ZAI-163/164 leak incident).
